what_changed: Avoided duplicate local-disk payload reads while grouping batched chunk-cache materialization.
pr-evidence/avoid-double-local-cache-pro.why: Mixed cold/local KV-cache requests should not read large local NVMe chunk files just to decide batch boundaries; actual local-hit validation still happens once when the cached chunk is returned.
